PR Maven CLI - Maven failure context

Project: <PROJECT_ROOT>
Modules: 3 | Reports: 2 | Findings: 2

1. payment-api-paymentapiit-shouldexposepaymentsummary-error
   Module: payment-api (payment-api)
   Report: payment-api/target/failsafe-reports/TEST-dev.prmaven.demo.PaymentApiIT.xml
   Plugin: maven-failsafe-plugin
   Phase: verify
   Test: dev.prmaven.demo.PaymentApiIT.shouldExposePaymentSummary
   Kind: error
   Message: java.net.ConnectException: connection refused
   Reproduce: mvn -pl payment-api -am -Dit.test=PaymentApiIT verify
   Confidence: high
   Reasons:
   - failure was found in a Maven Failsafe JUnit XML report
   - report path maps to Maven module payment-api
   - reproduction command targets test class PaymentApiIT

   Module: payment-core (payment-core)

   Plugin: maven-surefire-plugin
   Phase: test

   Kind: failure
   Message: expected:<2.50> but was:<2.49>
